authorized_effects: Record an evidence-only repository readiness decision.
Recommend proposing a separate governed context-pack integration plan.
blocked_effects: No retrieval, embedding, or reranking changes.
rationale: GAP-0002 remains open for graph-local scoped memory context selection.
CAP-0006 provides evidence evaluation for graph neighborhood reports.
CAP-0007 provides evidence-only readiness decision semantics.
A separate context-pack integration plan is justified only as a future governed proposal, not as part of this artifact.
required_next_governance: Any context-pack integration must be proposed as a separate governed context-pack integration plan.
Any integration plan must receive its own admission warrant before implementation.
Existing default context-pack behavior must remain unchanged until separately admitted.
summary: CAP-0006/CAP-0007 evidence supports proposing a separate governed context-pack integration plan for graph-local scoped memory. This decision artifact does not implement or admit integration.
title: Graph neighborhood repository readiness decision
